stemHtml: Regarding the North Atlantic High Level Airspace (NAT HLA), which is correct?

options.a: OTS are westbound tracks during the day and PBCS tracks are eastbound.
options.b: OTS are eastbound tracks during the day and PBCS tracks are westbound.
options.c: NAT HLA approval is dependent on the aircraft meeting required communication and navigation performance standards.
options.d: All flights in NAT HLA must use the Organized Track System (OTS).
